become_guide.hero_title_1: Your freedom as an adventure guide
become_guide.hero_description: Aventurei is the active tourism platform specialized in nature where certified guides from Valencia build their independent business — 100% free, without depending on massive platforms that keep your margin.
become_guide.urgency_bar: 0% commission, totally free. Only 20 spots available in Valencia in this beta phase — when they fill up, we close the form.
become_guide.problem_title: Being an independent guide shouldn't be a constant struggle
become_guide.problem_subtitle: You know the mountain better than anyone, but the current digital ecosystem is designed to squeeze you, not empower you.
become_guide.pain_1_desc: Large platforms take up to 30% of your effort, drastically reducing your real margin.
become_guide.pain_2_desc: Your profile competes with hundreds of guides. The algorithm decides who appears first. You control nothing.
become_guide.pain_3_desc: If they change the algorithm, your business sinks. You have no control over your customers or their data.
become_guide.pain_4_desc: You compete on price against massive operators that devalue the quality of the real nature experience.
become_guide.solution_title: Reclaim the value of your work and connect with real travelers
become_guide.sol_1_desc: We don't mix things up. Here there are only authentic ecotourism and active sport experiences. The customer who enters is looking for what you offer.
become_guide.sol_2_desc: We charge nothing to publish your adventures or receive contacts. Zero commission, zero monthly fee. Your money is yours.
become_guide.sol_3_title: Total control over your calendar and prices
become_guide.sol_3_desc: You decide when you work, how much you charge, and how you organize your routes. No impositions. No unilateral changes.
become_guide.sol_4_desc: Our audience seeks quality over quantity. People who value the experience, respect nature, and repeat.
become_guide.comparison_subtitle: We are not a tour supermarket. We are a select community of professionals.
become_guide.comp_massive_2: Mix of everything (Museums, Tour bus, Nature)
become_guide.final_title: Ready to lead your own adventure?
become_guide.final_description: We don't ask you to marry us. We only ask for 15 minutes to explain how we can help you live better from your passion.
become_guide.form_footer: Your data is safe. We will only use it to contact you.

about_page.sobre_p1: Aventurei Spain was born to connect people passionate about nature, culture, and adventure with the best destinations and outdoor experiences in the country. In a territory as diverse as Spain — with imposing mountains, preserved natural parks, historical villages, and a spectacular coastline — we believe that exploring is more than traveling: it's living with purpose.
about_page.sobre_p2: We are a platform dedicated to ecotourism and experience tourism. We facilitate the connection between travelers and qualified local guides, offering detailed information about destinations, activities, and difficulty levels. From mountain trekking to kayak routes, from cycle tourism to cultural experiences in local communities, Aventurei makes discovery simple, safe, and inspiring.
about_page.mission_desc: To promote authentic experiences in contact with nature, valuing sustainability, respect for the environment, and the development of local economies.
about_page.vision_desc: To be the leading ecotourism platform in Spain, recognized for connecting people with transformative experiences and for strengthening a network of guides committed to quality, safety, and environmental awareness.
items: Sustainability — We encourage responsible and low-impact environmental practices.
Community — We strengthen local guides and promote real human connections.
Adventure with Safety — Experiences planned with responsibility and professionalism.
Environmental Awareness — Explore while preserving, always.
about_page.sobre_footer_1: At Aventurei, we believe that every trail traveled, every mountain climbed, and every river explored is an opportunity for reconnection — with nature, with the world, and with oneself.

how_it_works_section.title: How Aventurei Works
how_it_works_section.description: Discovering new adventures in Spain has never been simpler. Aventurei connects you with the best destinations and local guides to live authentic experiences in nature.
how_it_works_section.step1_description: Discover trails, climbing and more. Use filters to find the perfect adventure for you.
how_it_works_section.step2_description: Meet local guides, see detailed activity descriptions, required experience levels, and important information to prepare safely.
how_it_works_section.step3_description: Contact the guide to ask questions and make your booking safely.
how_it_works_section.step4_description: Meet your guide at the agreed location and enjoy an authentic, safe, and nature-connected experience.
how_it_works_section.benefit1_desc: We only work with professionals who have a proven track record and current certifications.
how_it_works_section.benefit2_desc: Get all your questions answered directly by those who know every detail of the route.
how_it_works_section.benefit3_desc: We believe in transparency. The price you agree with the guide is what you pay.
how_it_works_section.cta_subtitle: Choose your destination and connect with the perfect guide today.
how_it_works_section.trust_safety_desc: Our platform prioritizes guides with official certifications and current insurance, ensuring you focus only on the experience.
how_it_works_section.sustainable_desc: We promote respect for nature and the development of local communities through conscious, low-impact tourism.
how_it_works_section.community_desc: We are not just a booking site; we are a network of passionate professionals who live and breathe the mountains.

onboarding_subtitle: Let's set up your profile so you can start offering your adventures.
onboarding_success_message: Your profile and your first adventure have been successfully configured. You are now part of our network of guides.
whatsapp_more_info: I would like more information about dates and bookings.

cookie_banner.title: We control your privacy
cookie_banner.description: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, display personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept all", you consent to the use of cookies.

faq_section.title: Frequent Questions
faq_section.description: Find answers to your questions about how Aventurei works and start your next journey.

questions.question: What is Aventurei?
questions.answer: Aventurei is a platform that connects outdoor enthusiasts with the best specialized guides in ecotourism and adventure tourism in Spain.

questions.question: How do I book an adventure?
questions.answer: When you find an adventure you like, you can contact the guide directly via the WhatsApp button available on the experience page. There are no intermediaries.

questions.question: Are the guides certified?
questions.answer: Yes, we partner with guides who hold certifications and have extensive local experience to ensure your adventure is safe and enriching.

questions.question: How is payment made?
questions.answer: Payment is made directly to the guide, according to the payment methods they accept. Aventurei does not charge booking fees to users.

questions.question: What if weather conditions are bad?
questions.answer: Safety comes first. In case of bad weather, the guide will contact you to reschedule or cancel the activity according to the safety policy of each modality.

questions.question: Do I need to bring my own equipment?
questions.answer: This varies by adventure. Generally, technical equipment (ropes, helmets, paddles) is included, but personal items like footwear and backpacks are the adventurer's responsibility. Always check the included items in the description.

questions.question: Does Aventurei offer health insurance?
questions.answer: At this stage, Aventurei acts as a connecting bridge. However, it is a requirement that our partner guides hold their own Civil Liability and Accident insurance for all activities offered.

questions.question: Can I participate if I have no previous experience?
questions.answer: Absolutely! We have adventures classified as 'Easy' that are ideal for beginners and families. The difficulty level is clearly indicated for each experience.

questions.question: How do I become a guide on Aventurei?
questions.answer: If you are a certified guide and want to join our network, go to the 'Become a Guide' page and fill out the interest form. Our team will contact you for the verification process.

faq_section.faq_cta_desc: We are here to help you plan your next adventure in the best possible way.

home_seo_section.title: Your Next Great Adventure Starts Here
home_seo_section.intro: Aventurei was born with a clear purpose: to democratize access to ecotourism and adventure tourism in an authentic and safe way. At Aventurei, we put human connection first, being the bridge that unites nature enthusiasts with professionals who dedicate their lives to exploring the unexplored.
home_seo_section.destinations_text: Currently focused on the wonders of Spain, Aventurei invites you to discover unique territories. Each destination on our platform is selected for its natural beauty and adventure potential, ensuring you see much more than the traditional tourist spots.
home_seo_section.activities_text: Our platform offers a diverse curation of modalities for all physical fitness levels:
activities_list: Trekking and Trails for deep immersion in local fauna and flora.
Rock Climbing and Rappelling for height lovers.
Canoeing, Rafting, and Canyoning for water enthusiasts.
Mountain Biking (MTB) on exclusive and challenging routes.
Multi-day expeditions with camping under the stars.
home_seo_section.differentiators_text: Why are we the preferred choice for thousands of adventurers?
differentiators_list: Direct Connection: Talk to the guide via WhatsApp before booking.
No Abusive Fees: The amount paid goes entirely to the professional service.
Certified Guides: Rigorous curation of qualified professionals.
Fair Price: Strengthened local economy and total transparency.
home_seo_section.safety_text: Safety and sustainability are the pillars that support our community. We require all partner guides to hold the necessary certifications to operate legally and actively promote responsible tourism basing our activities on 'Leave No Trace' principles.
